sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19321" key="ba/ptisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βάπτ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n19321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">baptism,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Matt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>, etc.; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">β. εἰς τὸν θάνατον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:6:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
